opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLM calls based on task complexity is often underestimated—you'll quickly hit diminishing returns with naive cost-based switching; cognitive load modeling (estimating the *reasoning* steps needed) tends to be far more effective. The local-first aspect is key, too; remote LLM inference introduces latency that can make interactive workflows brittle. Consider a hierarchical agent architecture—a meta-agent to manage the specialized agents—for better scalability.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agentic systems with LLMs and tool orchestration, so I have direct experience with the challenges SysNav addresses.
